title: Winning Moves Marvel Guess Who? Board Game, The Avengers, Guardians of the Galaxy and Wakanda forces are included from Hulk, Iron Man, Black Widow, Black Panther, Rocket, great gift for ages 6 plus
features: 24 Marvel heroes feature in this new edition of Hasbro’s classic face guessing game
Ask the right YES or NO questions to close as many doors as possible and figure out your opponent’s Mystery Character
Add the ultimate twist in the Championship game by being the first to win five matches
Quick to set up, easy to play and fun for all the family — perfect as a gift
Is your Mystery Character wearing red? Do they have a helmet? Is it Star-Lord?

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Choking Hazard: Contains small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years. Ensure all pieces are accounted for after playing to avoid accidental ingestion. Store the game in a safe place out of reach of very young children.
